title: Gorky 3: My Universities
writer: Maxim Gorky, Mark Donskoy, Ilya Gruzdev
actors: Nikolai Valbert, Stepan Kayukov, Nikolai Dorokhin
plot: The last installment of Russian director Mark Donskoy's Maxim Gorky trilogy. Having endured a painful youth in Gorky 1: The Childhood of Maxim Gorky (1938) and a torturous sojourn as a serf in My Apprenticeship, future writer Maxi...
